title: URGENT - Progress Tells ShareFile Customers to Shut Down Storage Zone Controllers Over Security Threat
description: Progress ordered ShareFile customers to shut down their Storage Zone Controllers while it investigates a credible external security threat.

'I'm not a programmer' anymore: Linus Torvalds on the only two tools he uses now | ZDNET
description: At the Open Source Summit in Mumbai, Torvalds discusses the pain and power of AI in the kernel, and why Linux no longer supports 'museum' technology.
